streetlife.name: Street Life Remastered
streetlife.desc: Live the street life, rise to the top
streetlife.details: Main TabInstant Prompts - makes all proximity prompts instantInfinite Stamina - prevents stamina from decreasing and locks Boost permanentlyInfinite Strength - keeps your Strength at 100Unlock Camera - sets camera max zoom distance to 1000Anti AFK - prevents being kicked for idlingATM - withdraw, deposit, or deposit all cashSend Money - send cash to any playerCommands - quick access to /handto, /pay, /drop, and custom commandsMoney Farm Tab (NEW)Money Generator - stand near Gun Buyer, auto-spawn and auto-sell gun for rapid cashTeleports TabSpawn Scooter - withdraws $250 and spawns a scooterCar Spawner - spawn any car from dealershipOther Player Car - unlock and teleport other vehiclesMisc Locations - vault, jewel, loot buyer, mechanic, etcAirdrop Spawns - court, the ice, oilrig, etcCopy & Paste Position - save coordinatesHouse Rob TabUnlock & teleport to apartmentsCombat TabAimlock with adjustable FOV, range, smoothingESP TabPlayer ESP with name, health bar, tracer, boxShop TabItem, food, weapon, ammo, mask shopsCrypto TabLive crypto values, auto-buy/sellCar Utils TabCar fly, no-clipUI TabInterface launcher for game UIsMisc TabAdditional utilities

bbqit.name: BBQ It
bbqit.desc: Fire up the grill, cook to perfection
bbqit.details: BBQ Automation (Main Tab)Auto Cook (Perfect) - automatically places raw meat on grills, watches it cook, picks up when "Perfect"Auto Plate - takes cooked meat and places onto empty platesAuto Sell (NPC) - automatically accepts NPC offersInstant Prompts - all interactions become instantShop Auto-BuyMulti-select for limited-stock meat & totemsMonitors stock every 1.5-2 secondsCooldowns prevent spam (0.8s meat, 1.5s totems)Restock alerts with notificationsPlayer ControlsWalkspeed, jump power, gravity, time of day slidersInfinite jump, noclip, rejoin, spoof
